Off Calendar Apr-05-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ralph Zappala, Esq., Lewis Brisbois (415) 438-6627, for Defendant and Moving Party Cooper Cameron Corporation
Stephen M. Fishback, Esq., Paul, Hanley & Harley LLP (510) 559-9980 for Plaintiff Casado
Nancy S. Calle, Esq. (Court Call), Tropio & Morian (818) 883-4000, for Defendant Atlantic Richfield
RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT COOPER CAMERON CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: Demurrer based on failure to state fact is OVERRULED; Demurrer based on statute of limitations is SUSTAINED with 15 days leave to explain the gap between 1999 diagnosis and 2003 filing of the complaint.
